name: sql优化_部门账号联系人通知_DS匹配增强版_DS匹配增强版_DS匹配增强版_DS匹配增强版

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "model": "qwen3.7-plus", "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": "严格根据输入提示完成分析，并且只输出 JSON。不要输出 Markdown，不要输出额外解释。" }, { "role": "user", "content": $json.prompt || "" } ], "stream": false } }}

parameters.query:
select email, userId, user
from employee
where (
  lower(coalesce(userId, '')) in (
    lower('{{ $('Notify Config').first().json.user }}'),
    lower('{{ $('Notify Config').first().json.executor }}'),
    lower('{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.user }}'),
    lower('{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.executor }}'),
    lower('{{ String($('Notify Config').first().json.user || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}'),
    lower('{{ String($('Notify Config').first().json.executor || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}'),
    lower('{{ String($('Webhook').item.json.body.user || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}'),
    lower('{{ String($('Webhook').item.json.body.executor || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}')
  )
  or lower(coalesce(user, '')) in (
    lower('{{ $('Notify Config').first().json.user }}'),
    lower('{{ $('Notify Config').first().json.executor }}'),
    lower('{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.user }}'),
    lower('{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.executor }}'),
    lower(concat('u_', '{{ String($('Notify Config').first().json.user || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}')),
    lower(concat('u_', '{{ String($('Notify Config').first().json.executor || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}')),
    lower(concat('u_', '{{ String($('Webhook').item.json.body.user || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}')),
    lower(concat('u_', '{{ String($('Webhook').item.json.body.executor || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}'))
  )
  or lower(substring_index(coalesce(email, ''), '@', 1)) in (
    lower('{{ String($('Notify Config').first().json.user || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}'),
    lower('{{ String($('Notify Config').first().json.executor || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}'),
    lower('{{ String($('Webhook').item.json.body.user || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}'),
    lower('{{ String($('Webhook').item.json.body.executor || '').replace(/^u_/i, '') }}')
  )
)
and email is not null
and trim(email) <> ''

parameters.jsCode:
const safeNodeJson = (nodeName) => {
  try {
    const node = $(nodeName).first();
    return node && node.json ? node.json : {};
  } catch (error) {
    return {};
  }
};
const notify = $json || {};
const base = {
  ...safeNodeJson('Build Langfuse Batch'),
  ...safeNodeJson('Merge DS Task Match'),
  ...safeNodeJson('Build Sidecar Payload'),
};
let langfuse = { skipped: true, reason: base.langfuseSkipReason || '' };
try {
  const node = $('Write Langfuse').first();
  langfuse = node && node.json ? node.json : langfuse;
} catch (error) {
  langfuse = { skipped: true, reason: String(error && error.message ? error.message : error) };
}
const aiResult = base.aiResult || {};
const evidenceAlert = (base.evidence || {}).alert || {};
const textOf = (value) => value === null || value === undefined ? '' : String(value);
const notifyConfig = base.notifyConfig || {};
const contactUpdateFormUrl = textOf(notifyConfig.contactUpdateFormUrl).trim();
const dsInfoText = base.dsTaskMatchOk ? ('SQL 所属 DS 任务：\n'
  + (textOf(base.dsCountryName) ? textOf(base.dsCountryName) + ' DS 调度' : 'DS 调度')
  + '「' + textOf(base.dsProject) + '」-「' + textOf(base.dsWorkflow) + '」-「' + textOf(base.dsTask) + '」任务\n'
  + '- 负责人：' + textOf(base.dsWorkflowOwner) + '\n'
  + '- 创建人：' + textOf(base.dsTaskCreator) + '\n\n') : '';
const dsMissingNoticeText = base.dsTaskMatchMissingNeedsRecord
  ? 'DS 归属缺失提醒：\n当前账号属于系统/部门/调度账号，但未匹配到对应 DS 项目 / 工作流 / 任务。需要人工确认其执行位置，如果有时间可以将执行位置发送给陈江川，本次已同步发送给江川协助跟进。\n\n'
  : '';
const backendSuggestionText = '异常查询：\n'
  + '- 集群：' + textOf(base.cluster) + '\n'
  + '- 优化后sql的详细地址：http://sr-admin.kuainiujinke.com/share/sql/' + textOf(base.queryId) + '\n'
  + '- CPU时间：' + textOf(evidenceAlert.cpuTime) + '\n'
  + '- 内存使用：' + textOf(evidenceAlert.memUsage) + '\n'
  + '- 执行时间：' + textOf(evidenceAlert.execTime) + '\n'
  + '- 扫描行数：' + textOf(evidenceAlert.scanRows) + '\n'
  + '- 用户：' + textOf(base.user) + '\n\n'
  + dsInfoText
  + dsMissingNoticeText
  + '告警原因：\n'
  + '- ' + textOf(evidenceAlert.violationDetail) + '\n\n'
  + 'AI结论：\n'
  + textOf(aiResult.oneLineConclusion) + '\n\n'
  + '核心问题：\n'
  + textOf(aiResult.coreIssue) + '\n\n'
  + '优化建议：\n'
  + textOf(aiResult.summary) + '\n\n'
  + '优化后SQL：\n'
  + textOf(aiResult.optimizedSql) + '\n\n'
  + '优化风险点：\n'
  + textOf(aiResult.risk) + '\n\n'
  + '需人工验证：\n'
  + textOf(aiResult.validationAdvice) + '\n\n'
  + '如果需要人工协助，请联系：\n'
  + textOf(base.countryOwnerNamesText)
  + (contactUpdateFormUrl ? '\n\n联系人调整表单：\n' + contactUpdateFormUrl : '');
return [{ json: {
  ok: true,
  sessionId: base.sessionId || '',
  queryId: base.queryId || '',
  cluster: base.cluster || '',
  user: base.user || '',
  executor: base.executor || '',
  result: aiResult || {},
  notifyEmail: textOf(base.notifyEmail || 'jiangchuanchen@kn.group') || 'jiangchuanchen@kn.group',
  notifyEmails: Array.isArray(base.notifyEmails) && base.notifyEmails.length ? base.notifyEmails : [textOf(base.notifyEmail || 'jiangchuanchen@kn.group') || 'jiangchuanchen@kn.group'],
  countryOwnerEmails: base.countryOwnerEmails || [],
  countryOwnerNames: base.countryOwnerNames || [],
  countryOwnerNamesText: textOf(base.countryOwnerNamesText),
  notifyTargetSource: base.notifyTargetSource || '',
  departmentAccountNotifyMatched: !!base.departmentAccountNotifyMatched,
  departmentAccountNotifySheets: base.departmentAccountNotifySheets || [],
  departmentAccountNotifyAccounts: base.departmentAccountNotifyAccounts || [],
  departmentAccountNotifyEmails: base.departmentAccountNotifyEmails || [],
  contactCsvParseOk: !!base.contactCsvParseOk,
  contactCsvRowCount: Number(base.contactCsvRowCount || 0),
  contactCsvStdoutLength: Number(base.contactCsvStdoutLength || 0),
  accountCandidates: base.accountCandidates || [],
  countryFallbackEmails: base.countryFallbackEmails || [],
  userInfo: base.userInfo || [],
  dsTaskMatchRequired: !!base.dsTaskMatchRequired,
  dsTaskMatchMissingNeedsRecord: !!base.dsTaskMatchMissingNeedsRecord,
  dsTaskMissingNotice: textOf(base.dsTaskMissingNotice),
  dsTaskMatchInfo: textOf(base.dsTaskMatchInfo),
  dsTaskMatchConfidence: textOf(base.dsTaskMatchConfidence),
  dsTaskMatchTables: base.dsTaskMatchTables || [],
  dsTaskCandidateCount: Number(base.dsTaskCandidateCount || 0),
  ...(base.dsTaskMatchOk ? {
    dsTaskMatchOk: true,
    dsProject: textOf(base.dsProject),
    dsWorkflow: textOf(base.dsWorkflow),
    dsTask: textOf(base.dsTask),
    dsWorkflowOwner: textOf(base.dsWorkflowOwner),
    dsTaskCreator: textOf(base.dsTaskCreator),
    dsCountryName: textOf(base.dsCountryName),
    dsTaskMatchInfo: textOf(base.dsTaskMatchInfo),
    dsTaskMatchConfidence: textOf(base.dsTaskMatchConfidence),
    dsTaskMatchTables: base.dsTaskMatchTables || [],
  } : {}),
  duplicateNotifySuppressed: !!base.duplicateNotifySuppressed,
  duplicateNotifyReason: base.duplicateNotifyReason || '',
  notifyResponse: notify,
  langfuse: {
    traceId: base.langfuseTraceId || '',
    generationId: base.langfuseGenerationId || '',
    generationIds: base.langfuseGenerationIds || [],
    traceName: base.langfuseTraceName || '',
    generationName: base.langfuseGenerationName || '',
    usage: base.langfuseUsage || { prompt_tokens: 0, completion_tokens: 0, total_tokens: 0 },
    attempts: base.langfuseAttempts || [],
    attemptCount: Number(base.langfuseAttemptCount || 0),
    accepted: !!langfuse && !langfuse.skipped,
    skipped: !!langfuse.skipped,
    response: langfuse
  },
  evidence: base.evidence || {},
  prompt: base.prompt || '',
  aiRawOutput: base.aiRawOutput || '',
  optimizedExplainChecked: !!base.optimizedExplainChecked,
  optimizedExplainOk: !!base.optimizedExplainOk,
  optimizedExplainPermissionDenied: !!base.optimizedExplainPermissionDenied,
  optimizedExplainError: base.optimizedExplainError || '',
  optimizedExplainSummary: base.optimizedExplainSummary || '',
  optimizedExplainRows: base.optimizedExplainRows || [],
  backendSuggestionText
}}];

parameters.content: Import the skill workflow first, then open Execute Skill Prep and reselect the imported workflow manually. Qwen API key has already been filled in Call Qwen Chat API.

parameters.command:
set -e

REPO=/tmp/KN-YCGJ-TZ
CSV=$REPO/alert-sql-notification/data/alert-contact-mapping.csv
REPO_URL=https://github.com/chenjiuxuan1/KN-YCGJ-TZ.git
BRANCH=main

export GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT=0

if [ -d "$REPO/.git" ]; then
  cd "$REPO"

  git merge --abort >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  git rebase --abort >/dev/null 2>&1 || true

  if ! git reset --hard HEAD >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    cd /tmp
    rm -rf "$REPO"
  fi
fi

if [ ! -d "$REPO/.git" ]; then
  rm -rf "$REPO"
  git clone --branch "$BRANCH" "$REPO_URL" "$REPO"
fi

cd "$REPO"
git remote set-url origin "$REPO_URL"
git fetch origin "$BRANCH"
git checkout -B "$BRANCH" "origin/$BRANCH"
git reset --hard "origin/$BRANCH"

if [ ! -s "$CSV" ]; then
  echo "CONTACT_CSV_NOT_FOUND_OR_EMPTY: $CSV" >&2
  exit 21
fi

CSV_BYTES=$(wc -c < "$CSV")
CSV_LINES=$(wc -l < "$CSV")

if [ "$CSV_BYTES" -lt 1000 ] || [ "$CSV_LINES" -lt 10 ]; then
  echo "CONTACT_CSV_TOO_SMALL: bytes=$CSV_BYTES lines=$CSV_LINES csv=$CSV" >&2
  exit 22
fi

echo "__N8N_CONTACT_CSV_META__ repo=$REPO csv=$CSV bytes=$CSV_BYTES lines=$CSV_LINES" >&2
echo "__N8N_CONTACT_CSV_BASE64_BEGIN__"
if base64 --help 2>/dev/null | grep -q -- '-w'; then
  base64 -w 0 "$CSV"
else
  base64 "$CSV" | tr -d '\n'
fi
echo
echo "__N8N_CONTACT_CSV_BASE64_END__"

nodes.name: Fetch Contact CSV
nodes.notes: 兼容当前 n8n：使用 SSH 节点连接 n8n 本机，拉取 GitHub main 后读取 /root/KN-YCGJ-TZ 下的 CSV，并用 base64 marker 输出给下游解析。

parameters.command:
set -e

REPO=/tmp/KN-YCGJ-TZ
CSV=$REPO/alert-sql-notification/data/alert-contact-mapping.csv
REPO_URL=https://github.com/chenjiuxuan1/KN-YCGJ-TZ.git
BRANCH=main

export GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT=0

if [ -d "$REPO/.git" ]; then
  cd "$REPO"

  git merge --abort >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  git rebase --abort >/dev/null 2>&1 || true

  if ! git reset --hard HEAD >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    cd /tmp
    rm -rf "$REPO"
  fi
fi

if [ ! -d "$REPO/.git" ]; then
  rm -rf "$REPO"
  git clone --branch "$BRANCH" "$REPO_URL" "$REPO"
fi

cd "$REPO"
git remote set-url origin "$REPO_URL"
git fetch origin "$BRANCH"
git checkout -B "$BRANCH" "origin/$BRANCH"
git reset --hard "origin/$BRANCH"

if [ ! -s "$CSV" ]; then
  echo "CONTACT_CSV_NOT_FOUND_OR_EMPTY: $CSV" >&2
  exit 21
fi

CSV_BYTES=$(wc -c < "$CSV")
CSV_LINES=$(wc -l < "$CSV")

if [ "$CSV_BYTES" -lt 1000 ] || [ "$CSV_LINES" -lt 10 ]; then
  echo "CONTACT_CSV_TOO_SMALL: bytes=$CSV_BYTES lines=$CSV_LINES csv=$CSV" >&2
  exit 22
fi

echo "__N8N_CONTACT_CSV_META__ repo=$REPO csv=$CSV bytes=$CSV_BYTES lines=$CSV_LINES" >&2
echo "__N8N_CONTACT_CSV_BASE64_BEGIN__"
if base64 --help 2>/dev/null | grep -q -- '-w'; then
  base64 -w 0 "$CSV"
else
  base64 "$CSV" | tr -d '\n'
fi
echo
echo "__N8N_CONTACT_CSV_BASE64_END__"

nodes.name: Fetch Contact CSV2
nodes.notes: 兼容当前 n8n：使用 SSH 节点连接 n8n 本机，拉取 GitHub main 后读取 /root/KN-YCGJ-TZ 下的 CSV，并用 base64 marker 输出给下游解析。

nodes.name: Should Match DS Task?
nodes.notes: 提前过滤个人账号：只有 user/executor/account/dbUser 等字段存在类似 u_、e_、e_ds_ 这类前缀时才进入 DS 匹配。像 jiangchuanchen 这种无前缀个人账号默认不是 DS 调度，直接跳过 DS 查询，避免误匹配和无意义查询。

nodes.name: Match DS Task Candidates
nodes.notes: 调用子 workflow：DS任务匹配候选查询_execute_workflow。子任务按国家走跳板机，在 SSH 节点机器通过 GitHub zip 拉取治理自动化代码，并查询 DS 3.4 元数据候选任务。导入后如 n8n 未自动按名称绑定，请手动选择该子 workflow。

nodes.name: Merge DS Task Match
nodes.notes: 复用 match_and_update.py 的 action + table set 匹配逻辑。匹配成功才向后续数据增加 dsProject/dsWorkflow/dsTask 等字段；匹配失败不影响原通知流程。
